hero.description: I build solid backend architectures on Azure. From database design to serverless in production, every decision is engineered to scale.

about.bio_1: Computer Engineer focused on backend and cloud architecture. Specialized in the Microsoft Azure ecosystem, I've led critical system migrations and designed scalable architectures under real pressure.
about.bio_2: I work under an Augmented Engineering model: I use AI as a force multiplier to deliver faster without sacrificing system integrity.
about.differentiator: I don't build AI models. I use them strategically to amplify every technical decision, reduce time-to-market, and focus on what matters: architecture and business logic.
about.quote: Architecture is a silent conversation between a system and its future.

jobs.description: End-to-end recruitment software development. Database design, APIs, Azure Functions, cloud service integration and real-time messaging with SignalR.
highlights: Technical lead for ERP migration Softland → Rex+ (0 data loss)
Serverless architecture with Azure Functions and TypeScript
Service integration: Blob, Queue, Table Storage, SignalR

jobs.description: Maintenance and development of new features in integration APIs. Incident resolution and CI/CD flow management.
highlights: Development and maintenance of integration APIs

jobs.description: Repair and maintenance of electronic equipment. Specialization in digital cameras and printers. This phase forged a systematic diagnostic mindset directly applied to debugging and software architecture today.
highlights: Specialization in digital cameras and printers
Foundational training in systematic thinking applied to software

projects.description: Projects that demonstrate solid architectures and real engineering solutions.

main_project.title: ERP Migration: Softland → Rex+
main_project.description: Full transition of the enterprise resource planning system. Design and execution of the complete ETL strategy: extraction, transformation and data loading guaranteeing zero data loss. Precise mapping of all business processes and deployment without interrupting operations.

placeholders.title: Azure Serverless Platform
placeholders.description: Microservices platform on Azure Functions with CosmosDB, SignalR and Queue Storage. Designed for high availability.

placeholders.title: RAG Documentation Engine
placeholders.description: Semantic search engine over internal technical documentation using vector embeddings and RAG architecture.
